results.title: [Distribution and drug sensitivity test of bacteria of patients on chronic rhinosinusitis with or without nasal polyps].

results.journal: Lin chuang er bi yan hou tou jing wai ke za zhi = Journal of clinical otorhinolaryngology head and neck surgery
